title: Nginx Load Balancer Baseline
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Replace the sample upstream addresses with reachable backend servers before validation.
Place the example inside the active http context or an included site config before running nginx -t.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
